title: Occult Entanglements
description: Complications, obligations, and unwanted attention that accumulates when a crew operates at the edges of the occult — things that come looking for them between jobs.

entries.result: A spirit that was disturbed during a recent job has followed someone home and refuses to leave until a debt is acknowledged.
An investigator has begun asking questions about the crew's last known whereabouts. They have no occult knowledge but they're thorough.
A practitioner who hired the crew for a job has vanished, and whoever took them is now asking the crew what they know.
Someone in the crew has begun dreaming about a location they've never visited, with increasing clarity.
A faction that operates through occult channels has flagged the crew for operating in their territory.
An object acquired during a job has attracted interest from something that won't make itself fully known yet.
A contact has been found dead, and the crew's name appears in their records.
A debt called in by a patron requires service that intersects uncomfortably with a current obligation.
Something the crew did during a job has left a mark — not literally, but in the way certain things notice.
A client from a previous job returns asking for a refund on the grounds that the job was completed incorrectly. They are technically right.
A rumor has been circulated about the crew that is accurate in every detail except the most important one.
A rival crew has offered to take a job that the current crew was first approached about. The client is waiting to see who accepts the terms.
A minor entity has developed an attachment to the crew's base of operations and needs to be negotiated with.
A crew member's past has surfaced in the form of someone who knows something they don't want known.
A protective arrangement that the crew operates under has expired without their knowledge and needs to be renegotiated.
Something the crew retrieved on behalf of a client is not where the client said they would keep it.
A message arrives containing only a time and a location. The sender is not identified. The time is tonight.
A crew member has been approached separately from the group by a third party offering them something.
A resource the crew relies on has become unavailable due to something that happened in the occult underground.
The crew's last job has had consequences they weren't told to expect and that the client clearly anticipated.
A binding that was placed on a crew member during an old job is becoming active again.
Someone the crew worked for has used their name to establish credibility with a dangerous party.
An investigator from an unspecified authority is asking very specifically about the crew's movements on a specific night.
A practitioner known to work against crews like this one has arrived in the city.
A third party has approached a client the crew is currently serving and offered to hire the crew away mid-job.
Something followed someone home from the last job and hasn't been identified yet.
A debt between two powerful factions has been defaulted and the crew is caught between the collecting party and the debtor.
A symbol associated with the crew has appeared in an unrelated location in circumstances that suggest someone is making a statement.
A crew member has been marked — not cursed, exactly, but noticed — by something that observes.
An old score the crew worked on has reopened when new information surfaced from an unexpected direction.
A patron has been compromised and the instructions they've been relaying to the crew may not have come from them.
A previous client refuses to pay the final portion of the fee until the crew addresses a consequence of their work they weren't contracted to handle.
A crew member has been placed under a compulsion they haven't identified yet.
An entity associated with a previous job has become aware of the crew's identities.
A former ally has shifted allegiances without notification, and the crew finds out in a way that creates immediate consequences.
A deal made during a job on behalf of the client turns out to have been made in the crew's name.
The crew's safe house has been surveilled — by whom and for how long is unclear.
An object the crew has handled recently has a property they weren't warned about and that someone is very interested in recovering.
A member of the crew has been receiving messages they haven't mentioned to the others.
A job the crew completed successfully has been attributed to a different crew and that crew has taken the credit — and the enemies that came with it.
